case_title: MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY vs. PORTILLO, MARTO ERNESTO et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $138.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, MARTO ERNESTO

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, BASED ON 9/2/97 ENTRY OF DEFAULT. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT'S ATTY. FRANK DRAGO. HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTILLO, MARTO ERNESTO $3,044.83 PRINCIPAL, $138.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,182.83
